metadata.name: Emergency Error Recovery
metadata.purpose: Comprehensive emergency error recovery framework providing graceful error handling, automated recovery strategies, and rollback procedures for critical system failures
metadata.author: Enterprise DevOps

executiveSummary.description: Enterprise-grade emergency recovery runbook that provides systematic error detection, categorization, and recovery strategies. Implements retry logic, automated rollback procedures, error context preservation, and graceful degradation for production environments.
keyChanges: Multi-strategy error recovery (retry, rollback, skip, fail)
Automated error context preservation and logging
Production-safe error handling with audit trail
prerequisites: System monitoring and logging infrastructure operational
Communication channels established for incident management

impact.downtime: Varies by error severity - 0 to 30 minutes
impact.rollbackTime: 5 to 15 minutes depending on recovery strategy

preFlightChecks.name: Monitoring Systems Active
preFlightChecks.description: Verify system monitoring and logging infrastructure is operational

onFailure.message: Monitoring systems offline - recovery visibility limited

preFlightChecks.name: Logging Infrastructure
preFlightChecks.description: Verify logging system is accessible and accepting logs

onFailure.message: Logging infrastructure unavailable - error context may be lost

preFlightChecks.name: Rollback Scripts Present
preFlightChecks.description: Check if rollback scripts are available in /tmp directory
preFlightChecks.expectedResult: One or more rollback scripts present

onFailure.message: No rollback scripts found - manual intervention may be required

preFlightChecks.name: Disk Space Available
preFlightChecks.description: Verify sufficient disk space for error logs and recovery operations

onFailure.message: Insufficient disk space - clean up before recovery

preFlightChecks.name: Network Connectivity
preFlightChecks.description: Verify network connectivity for external service recovery

onFailure.message: Network connectivity issues - external dependencies may fail

preFlightChecks.name: Recent Backup Available
preFlightChecks.description: Verify recent backup exists for critical data
preFlightChecks.expectedResult: At least one backup from last 24 hours

onFailure.message: No recent backup found - data loss risk if rollback required

phases.name: Error Detection and Classification
phases.description: Identify and classify the error based on exit code, context, and system state

steps.name: Capture Error Context
steps.description: Capture error code, source location, and system state at time of failure
steps.purpose: Preserve error context for analysis and recovery decision

onFailure.message: Failed to capture error context - attempting retry

steps.name: Determine Error Severity
steps.description: Classify error as INFO, WARNING, ERROR, or CRITICAL based on exit code and context
commands: if [ $ERROR_CODE -eq 0 ]; then echo 'INFO'; elif [ $ERROR_CODE -lt 10 ]; then echo 'WARNING'; elif [ $ERROR_CODE -lt 100 ]; then echo 'ERROR'; else echo 'CRITICAL'; fi
steps.purpose: Categorize error for appropriate recovery strategy selection

onFailure.message: Cannot determine error severity - manual intervention required

steps.name: Log Error Details
steps.description: Write comprehensive error details to structured log
steps.purpose: Create audit trail and enable post-incident analysis

onFailure.message: Warning: Error logging failed - continuing with recovery

phases.name: Recovery Strategy Selection
phases.description: Select and prepare appropriate recovery strategy based on error classification

steps.name: Evaluate Recovery Options
steps.description: Analyze available recovery strategies: retry, rollback, skip, or fail
commands: echo "Available strategies: retry, rollback, skip, fail"

onFailure.message: Cannot evaluate recovery options

steps.name: Select Recovery Strategy
steps.description: Choose recovery strategy based on error type and system state

validation.criteria: Returns one of: retry, rollback, skip, fail

onFailure.message: Invalid recovery strategy selected

steps.name: Prepare Recovery Environment
steps.description: Set up necessary environment variables and validate preconditions

onFailure.message: Failed to prepare recovery environment

phases.name: Execute Recovery Strategy
phases.description: Execute the selected recovery strategy with monitoring and validation

steps.name: Strategy: Retry Operation
steps.description: Attempt to retry the failed operation with exponential backoff

onFailure.message: Retry strategy failed - initiating rollback

steps.name: Strategy: Rollback Changes
steps.description: Execute rollback script to revert changes
steps.purpose: Revert system to last known good state

onFailure.message: Rollback failed - manual intervention required immediately

steps.name: Strategy: Skip and Continue
steps.description: Log warning and continue execution for non-critical errors
steps.purpose: Allow graceful degradation for non-critical failures

onFailure.message: Skip strategy failed unexpectedly

steps.name: Strategy: Fail Fast
steps.description: Log critical error and abort execution
steps.purpose: Prevent cascade failures in critical situations

onFailure.message: Critical failure - system in unknown state

phases.name: Rollback Execution
phases.description: Execute rollback procedures to restore system to stable state

steps.name: Locate Rollback Script
steps.description: Find appropriate rollback script for the failed context

onFailure.message: No rollback script found for context - manual rollback required

steps.name: Validate Rollback Script
steps.description: Verify rollback script is executable and syntactically valid
steps.purpose: Ensure rollback script is safe to execute

onFailure.message: Rollback script validation failed - manual review required

steps.name: Execute Rollback
steps.description: Run rollback script with error handling

onFailure.message: Rollback execution failed - critical manual intervention required

steps.name: Log Rollback Completion
steps.description: Record rollback success and create incident report
steps.purpose: Document rollback for audit and analysis

onFailure.message: Warning: Failed to log rollback completion

phases.name: Post-Recovery Validation
phases.description: Verify system health and stability after recovery

steps.name: Check Service Health
steps.description: Verify critical services are running and responding

onFailure.message: Service health check failed - retrying

steps.name: Validate Database Connectivity
steps.description: Test database connections and query execution
steps.command: docker exec postgres pg_isready -U ectropy_user -d ectropy_db

onFailure.message: Database not responding after recovery

steps.name: Test API Endpoints
steps.description: Execute smoke tests on critical API endpoints

onFailure.message: API health checks failing - retrying

steps.name: Generate Recovery Report
steps.description: Create comprehensive recovery report for incident log

onFailure.message: Recovery report generation failed - recovery still successful

smokeTests.test: API Gateway responds to health checks

rollback.decisionMaker: Automated based on error severity or manual by DevOps Lead

steps.name: Validate Script Integrity
steps.purpose: Ensure rollback script is valid and safe

steps.name: Execute Rollback
steps.purpose: Revert system to previous stable state

verification.successCriteria: All services healthy and database connectivity restored

alertThresholds.condition: Repeated errors in same context within 1 hour

successCriteria.criterion: Error context successfully captured and logged
successCriteria.validation: Error details written to structured log
One of: retry, rollback, skip, fail executed successfully
No additional errors in 5 minute window
Recovery report generated with timestamp and outcome
No active alerts related to recovered services

supportedQueries.returns: retry (with exponential backoff), rollback (restore previous state), skip (graceful degradation), fail (abort execution)

supportedQueries.query: How do I handle a critical error in production?
supportedQueries.returns: Execute emergency error recovery runbook: capture context, select strategy (usually rollback for critical errors), execute rollback, validate system health
/tmp/rollback-{context}.sh - scripts must be prepared before deployment
Manual intervention required immediately - escalate to senior DevOps, declare emergency incident, follow disaster recovery procedures

supportedQueries.query: How long does emergency recovery take?
supportedQueries.returns: Typically 5-15 minutes depending on strategy: retry (2-5 min), rollback (5-10 min), skip (immediate), fail (immediate)
Service health checks, database connectivity test, API endpoint smoke tests, performance threshold validation, monitoring alert verification

supportedQueries.query: When should I use retry vs rollback?
supportedQueries.returns: Retry: transient network/API failures, rate limits. Rollback: critical failures, data integrity issues, deployment problems, persistent errors

decisionSupport: Automated error classification guides recovery strategy selection
Rollback script availability determines feasibility of automated recovery
System health validation prevents premature recovery completion
Retry with exponential backoff prevents thundering herd
Graceful degradation via skip strategy maintains partial service
Fail-fast prevents cascade failures in critical paths
Comprehensive logging enables root cause analysis

architectureAlignment.routingConfig: Supports all services - API Gateway, MCP Server, Web Dashboard, Databases
architectureAlignment.oauthConfig: N/A - emergency recovery focuses on infrastructure

required.name: ERROR_RECOVERY_MODE
required.description: Flag indicating system is in recovery mode

required.name: RECOVERY_TIMESTAMP
required.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when recovery was initiated

required.name: ROLLBACK_SCRIPT
required.description: Path to rollback script for current context

knownIssues.title: Rollback scripts may not exist for all contexts
knownIssues.impact: Automated rollback unavailable - manual intervention required
knownIssues.mitigation: Pre-create rollback scripts for critical operations during deployment planning
knownIssues.action: Create rollback script templates for common failure scenarios

knownIssues.title: Retry strategy may cause thundering herd on external APIs
knownIssues.impact: Exponential backoff mitigates but doesn't eliminate risk
knownIssues.mitigation: Use circuit breaker pattern with retry strategy
knownIssues.action: Implement jitter in retry backoff calculations

knownIssues.title: Log disk space exhaustion during high error volume
knownIssues.impact: Recovery logging may fail, losing audit trail
knownIssues.mitigation: Log rotation configured with 100MB limit per file
knownIssues.action: Monitor disk space and implement log compression

knownIssues.title: Database rollback may require manual transaction handling
knownIssues.impact: Automated rollback cannot undo committed transactions
knownIssues.mitigation: Use database migrations with explicit down() functions

knownIssues.title: Network partition may prevent health check validation
knownIssues.impact: Post-recovery validation may fail despite successful recovery
knownIssues.mitigation: Multiple health check endpoints with timeout handling
knownIssues.action: Implement local health checks in addition to HTTP
